headline: Arthur J. Gallagher Q1 Earnings Beat, Commissions and Fees Rise Y/Y
summary: AJG tops Q1 estimates as commissions and fees lift revenues by 28% Y/Y, with Risk Management margin expansion and eight deals closed.
